content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于4月29日17:20(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 

【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50

【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年5月13日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
一、问题修复
【活动】
● 修复了 V2.5.0.3 更新后，命轮纪行「枫丹茶韵」中的任务「完成禁忌试炼中任意赛季任务」无法通过完成「相位对弈」的预组模式和轮选模式赛季任务达成的问题。
    ○ 对于此前已经完成「相位对弈」预组模式或轮选模式赛季任务的守密人，修复后相应的纪行任务将会自动达成。
【战斗】
● 关卡
    ○ 修复了「星辰篇」5-15「茧」中战斗场景显示异常的问题。
    ○ 修复了敌人「背弃之网」涅芙蕾亚生命值降低至 1 点进入「免疫伤害」状态后，若于下次行动前被石化或昏迷，「免疫伤害」状态会错误地在石化或昏迷状态结束后提前结束的问题。修复后「免疫伤害」状态在该敌人释放下一个技能后结束。
    ○ 修复了敌人「提灯信徒」、「提灯虔诚者」、「护灯尊者」生命值低于「命运裁断」的斩杀阈值时，无法被正确斩杀的问题。
【综合】
● 兼容性
    ○ 修复了使用部分移动设备游玩时，战斗中的唤醒体与敌人未正常显示的问题。

二、已知问题
以下问题我们已记录在案，将在后续更新中修复：
● 「战斗」中发动「超维空间」后，在某些情况下会出现场景显示异常的问题。
● 「调查数据」中算力消耗数值在某些情况下大幅异常的问题。
● 「秘典书库」的广播剧「背弃的慈恩」在通关「星辰篇」5-1 后错误地提前解锁的问题，应该为通关「星辰篇」5-16 后解锁。
● 唤醒体「潘狄娅」、「莉莉」、「凯刻斯」、「温柯尔」释放灵知觉醒时，若本回合拥有「临时伤害强效」，下回合「临时伤害强效」移除后，触发上述灵知觉醒的效果依然能够错误地享受等同于拥有「临时强效」时增益的问题，应和护盾、回复生命类觉醒一致。
● 唤醒体通过「使用卡牌」触发「灵知觉醒」获取「力量、触腕伤害、中毒、反击」时，若该卡牌享受「奇点信标」或「奇点棱镜」加成，则「灵知觉醒」相关效果也能够错误地享受「奇点信标」或「奇点棱镜」加成的问题，应和护盾、回复生命类觉醒一致。

V2.5.0.5 Online Maintenance Announcement

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on April 29 at 17:20(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!

[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50

[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on May 13, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.

[Update content]
1. Bug Fixes

[Event]
● Fixed an issue after the V2.5.0.3 update where the mission "Complete any Seasonal Mission in Taboo Quests" in the Wheel of Destiny chronicle "L'Heure du Thé" could not be completed by finishing Seasonal Missions in the All Pick or Draft Pick modes of Traphase.
○ For Keepers who have previously completed the "Traphase" All Pick or Draft Pick Seasonal Missions, the corresponding Chronicle Missions will be automatically completed after the fix.

[Combat]
● Stage
○ Fixed an issue where the battle scene displayed abnormally in "Astral Reign" 5-15 "Cocoon".
○ Fixed an issue where the "Immune to Damage" State of enemy "Web of Betrayal" Nefraea would incorrectly end early after being Petrified or Fainted before her next Operation, when her HP dropped to 1. After the fix, the "Immune to Damage" State ends after the enemy Unleashes her next skill.
○ Fixed an issue where enemies "Lantern Believer," "Lantern Devotee," and "Luminary" could not be correctly executed when their HP fell below the execution threshold of "Final Verdict."

[General]
● Compatibility
○ Fixed an issue where Awakeners and enemies were not displaying correctly in combat when playing on certain mobile devices.

II. Known Issues

The following issues have been recorded and will be fixed in future updates:
● After activating "Ultra Space" in "Battle," there is an issue where the scene display may appear abnormal in certain situations.
● Fixed an issue where the Arithmetica Cost values in "Survey Data" were significantly abnormal in certain situations.
● The issue where the audio drama "Betrayed Grace" in the "Library" was incorrectly unlocked early after Clearing "Astral Reign" 5-1 has been fixed; it should be unlocked after Clearing "Astral Reign" 5-16.
● When Awakeners "Pandia," "Lily," "Caecus," and "Winkle" unleash Gnosis Rouse, if "Temporary DMG Amplification" is possessed during the current turn, after "Temporary DMG Amplification" is removed in the following turn, the effects triggered by the aforementioned Gnosis Rouse could still incorrectly benefit from the same buffs as having "Temporary Amplification." This issue should be consistent with Shield and HP Recovery type Rouse.
● Fixed an issue where, when an Awakener triggers "Rouse" via "using a Card" to gain "Strength, Tentacle DMG, Poison, Counter," if that Card benefits from "Singularity Beacon" or "Singularity Prism" bonuses, the effects related to "Rouse" would also incorrectly benefit from "Singularity Beacon" or "Singularity Prism" bonuses — this should be consistent with Shield and HP Recovery type Rouse effects.
